zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl於1486年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll21歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll27歲。她和John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1546年2月2日在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年60歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl于1486年出生在苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll21岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll27岁。她和John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1546年2月2日在英国苏格兰培爾培斯享年60岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培爾登可爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl was born in 1486, in Fife, Scotland, her father, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, was 21 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl. She died on 2 February 1546, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl est née en 1486, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1546, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl 1486 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll 21 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll 27. Sie hatte mit John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1546 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl è nata il nel 1486 nel Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl. Morì il 2 febbraio 1546, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Athollが1486年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyllは21歳，母Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyllは27歳であった。彼女はJohn Stewart 2nd Earl of Athollとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1546年2月2日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで60歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl(이)가 1486년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1546년 2월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl nasceu em 1486, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1546, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunkeld, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl родилась в 1486 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl. Она умерла 2 февраля 1546 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl nació en 1486, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1546, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Dunkeld, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
